# steam-mcp — full LLM corpus (v0.3.0)

FastMCP 3.2 MCP server for Valve Steam Web API. Backend 11020, frontend 11021.

## Portmanteau surface

| Tool | Operations |
|------|------------|
| steam_profile | own, summaries, friends, resolve_vanity |
| steam_library | owned, recent, details, wishlist |
| steam_stats | achievements, global_percentages, players, leaderboards |
| steam_store | news, search, reviews |
| steam_workshop | query, item_details |
| steam_system | status, steamcmd_status |

Also: steam_help, agentic_steam_workflow, show_steam_status_card, show_library_card, show_store_search_card, show_workshop_card, show_player_count_card.

## Auth & env

- STEAM_API_KEY — required for profile, library, workshop, wishlist
- STEAM_ID — default 64-bit ID
- STEAMCMD_PATH — optional SteamCMD detection
- BACKEND_PORT=11020, FRONTEND_PORT=11021
- STEAM_CHAT_MODE=hybrid|llm|rules
- AI_PROVIDER, AI_ENDPOINT, AI_MODEL — web chat LLM routing
- STEAM_PREFAB_APPS=0 — disable prefab-ui App tools

## FastMCP 3.2 features

- Portmanteau tools with markdown `message` + structured `data`
- Prompts, resources, SkillsDirectoryProvider (skill://steam-mcp/SKILL.md)
- Prefab UI cards (app=True when prefab-ui installed)
- agentic_steam_workflow (MCP sampling when host supports ctx.sample)
- Hybrid chat: Ollama JSON tool-call router + rule fallback

## Packaging

- manifest.json + build_mcpb.py → dist/steam-mcp.mcpb
- glama.json — Glama discovery (repo only, not in MCPB)
- native/ — Tauri 2 sidecar (steam-mcp-backend.exe on 11020)

## REST (webapp)

- GET /api/status, /api/tools, /api/llm/models
- POST /api/chat, /api/tools/{name}/call, /api/llm/configure
- MCP streamable HTTP at /mcp

## Skill

src/steam_mcp/skills/steam-mcp/SKILL.md

## Fleet

mcp-central-docs/projects/steam-mcp/README.md
